channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump to allege Chinese meddling in U.S. elections in primetime speech, sources say
item.description: Part of President Trump's speech Thursday night is expected to address previously unreported alleged Chinese interference in U.S. elections, according to...

item.title: Iran live updates: Jordan intercepts 8 Iranian missiles, state media reports
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Trump to deliver primetime address on 2020 election, sources say
item.description: Trump has repeatedly promoted debunked conspiracy theories alleging his 2020 election loss was fraudulent.

item.title: Councilwoman shot, husband killed in Mexico near U.S. border
item.description: Maria de Jesus Quijada was shot while traveling in a vehicle with her family. Her husband died in the attack.
